title: AutoGrind Evals
description: Output quality evals for the AutoGrind skill (agentskills.io evaluating-skills format)

skill_name.description: Name of the skill being evaluated

id.description: Unique sequential integer ID for this eval case

prompt.description: Realistic scenario description presented to the agent

expected_output.description: Prose description of what correct agent behavior looks like

items.description: A verifiable, specific pass/fail statement about agent output

assertions.description: List of verifiable assertions to grade the agent response against
